description_long: This is a rectangular, dark wood cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features three horizontal drawers with metallic handles and an open shelf above them, providing both concealed and open storage options. The cabinet stands on four tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated profile. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, adding a natural and elegant touch. The sides and back are solid panels with no additional features or openings. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and suitable for use in living rooms, offices, or urban waiting areas.
description: A dark wood cabinet with three drawers, metallic handles, and an open shelf above, standing on four tapered legs. The design is modern and minimalist with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid wood panel with visible grain and two legs.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood panel and all four legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a solid wood panel and two legs.
description_view_3: Front view revealing three drawers with metallic handles, an open shelf above, and all four legs.
